title: bupleurum rischawianum
intro: Bupleurum rischawianum, also known as Chaffy Hare's Ear, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum rischawianum include reduced inflammation and stress, improved liver function, and enhanced immune system function. Bupleurum rischawianum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root and rhizome, tea, capsules, and tinctures.
